description: The Preferences class describes the set of configurable preferences that are retained between sessions. It can be accessed with the ui.preferences object or through the Preferences Dialog.

members.name: defaults
members.description: A dictionary of preferences with their default values.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Save preference values to disk. Unless saved, changes to preferences will be lost, next time application is started.

methods.name: resetToDefaults
methods.description: Reset all preferences to their default values.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Returns the total number of preferences.
Get or set specific preference given a preference name key.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the Preferences Class wiki page
